title: Indian Food Nutrition & Calories Dataset - 250+ Items
subtitle: Comprehensive nutritional data for 250+ Indian dishes - Perfect for ML & Analysis
description: A comprehensive nutritional dataset containing 250+ popular Indian food items with detailed macronutrient and micronutrient information. Includes calories, protein, fat, carbs, fiber, vitamins, minerals, cooking methods, and regional classifications. Perfect for beginners practicing data analysis, machine learning projects, and nutritional research.

resources.description: Main dataset containing 250+ Indian food items with complete nutritional information
Comprehensive documentation with usage examples and dataset details
